RestaurantProfile.title: RestaurantProfile
RestaurantProfile.description: Represents the profile and general information of a restaurant, including its identity, location, contact, and business specifics.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RestaurantProfile entity.

name.description: The official name of the restaurant, e.g., 'Meow Momo'.

category.description: The category of the restaurant, e.g., 'Fast Food Restaurant'.

imageUrl.description: Hero image URL for the restaurant landing page.

googleRating.description: The average Google rating of the restaurant on a scale, e.g., 4.9.

priceRangeMin.description: The minimum estimated price per person in local currency, e.g., 1.

priceRangeMax.description: The maximum estimated price per person in local currency, e.g., 200.

address.description: The complete physical address of the restaurant.

latitude.description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the restaurant's location.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the restaurant's location.

ownerPhone.description: The owner's contact phone number, often used for WhatsApp orders.

businessPhone.description: The general business contact phone number for the restaurant.

googleMapsUrl.description: URL to the restaurant's location on Google Maps.

whatsAppOrderUrl.description: URL for placing orders directly via WhatsApp.

description.description: A detailed textual description of the restaurant and its culinary offerings.

businessHighlights.description: A list of key selling points or unique features of the business.

paymentMethods.description: A list of accepted payment methods at the restaurant.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's complete order placed at the restaurant, including customer details, payment, and status.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

customerId.description: The UID of the customer who placed the order (for history).

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was initially placed.

customerName.description: The name of the customer who placed this order.

customerContact.description: The primary contact information (e.g., phone number or email) for the customer.

deliveryAddress.description: The full address for delivery, if the order is for delivery.

totalAmount.description: The total monetary value of the order.

paymentMethod.description: The chosen method of payment for the order.

status.description: The current processing status of the order.

notes.description: Any special instructions or general notes.

OrderItem.title: OrderItem
OrderItem.description: Represents a specific menu item included as part of a larger customer order.

id.description: Unique identifier for the OrderItem entity.

priceAtOrder.description: The price of the menu item at the exact moment the order was placed.

name.description: The name of the item at time of order.
